title: Composer Bootstrap and Factory Initialization
entry_points: Factory::create(IOInterface $io, $config = null, $disablePlugins = false, bool $disableScripts = false): Composer  [static]
interaction_flow: Caller → Factory: create(io, config, disablePlugins, disableScripts)  [static]
Factory → Factory: createComposer(io, config, disablePlugins, cwd=null, fullLoad=true, disableScripts)
Factory → Factory: getComposerFile() → composerFile path  [reads COMPOSER env or './composer.json']
Factory → JsonFile: new JsonFile(composerFile, null, io)
Factory → Config: merge([home, cache-dir, data-dir], SOURCE_DEFAULT)
Factory → Factory: loadComposerAuthEnv(config, io)  [reads COMPOSER_AUTH env, merges into config]
== Back in createComposer: merge local config ==
Factory → Config: merge(localConfig, localConfigSource)  [local composer.json overrides global]
Factory → JsonFile: new JsonFile(dirname/auth.json)  [local auth.json if exists]
Factory → Factory: loadComposerAuthEnv(config, io)  [re-apply env auth on top]
Factory → Composer: new Composer()  [if fullLoad=true, else new PartialComposer()]
opt fullLoad: Factory → IOInterface: loadConfiguration(config)  [auth credentials into IO]
Factory → EventDispatcher: new EventDispatcher(composer, io, process)
Factory → RepositoryFactory: manager(io, config, httpDownloader, dispatcher, process) → RepositoryManager
Factory → VersionGuesser: new VersionGuesser(config, process, parser, io)
Factory → Factory: loadRootPackage(rm, config, parser, guesser, io) → RootPackageLoader
Factory → Factory: addLocalRepository(io, rm, vendorDir, package, process)
Factory → Factory: createInstallationManager(loop, io, dispatcher) → InstallationManager
Factory → Factory: createDownloadManager(io, config, httpDownloader, process, dispatcher) → DownloadManager
Factory → Factory: createArchiveManager(config, dm, loop) → ArchiveManager
Factory → Factory: createDefaultInstallers(im, composer, io, process)  [adds LibraryInstaller, PluginInstaller, MetapackageInstaller]
Factory → Locker: new Package\Locker(io, JsonFile(lockFile), im, file_get_contents(composerFile), process)
opt !isGlobal: Factory → Factory: createGlobalComposer(io, config, disablePlugins, disableScripts) → globalComposer
Factory → Factory: createPluginManager(io, composer, globalComposer, disablePlugins) → PluginManager
Factory → Factory: purgePackages(rm.getLocalRepository(), im)  [remove missing packages]
key_relationships: PartialComposer holds: Config, RootPackageInterface, Loop, RepositoryManager, InstallationManager, EventDispatcher
Composer adds: Locker, DownloadManager, PluginManager, AutoloadGenerator, ArchiveManager
Factory creates and wires all services into Composer
Factory depends_on JsonFile (reads composer.json and auth.json)
conditional_branches: fullLoad=true → creates Composer (full); false → creates PartialComposer (partial, no dm/am/locker/plugins)
isGlobal=true → skips createGlobalComposer call; sets pm.runningInGlobalDir=true
composerFile exists → Locker uses real lock file; else uses json-encoded localConfig string
config_loading_order: 7. COMPOSER_AUTH env again (re-applied last to win)
important_notes: Factory::create() is the public static entry point; internally creates a Factory instance and calls createComposer(). Factory::createComposer() returns Composer (fullLoad=true) or PartialComposer (fullLoad=false). ClassLoader is NOT directly wired in Factory — it is managed by AutoloadGenerator post-install. Config resolves {$refs} in values and checks COMPOSER_* env vars in get(). createGlobalComposer() is a recursive call to createComposer() pointing at $home/composer.json.
